Map NFert crop label to QUEFTS crop parameters (backward-compatible)

Source: R/nfert_crop_pars_quefts.R
nfert_crop_pars_quefts.Rd

Returns parameters for Rquefts::quefts(). If crop_params is already a full QUEFTS crop list, it is returned unchanged. Otherwise this function calls nfert_to_quefts_crop() using inst/extdata/quefts_crop_pars_IT.csv. If the crop is missing from that table, it falls back to Rquefts::quefts_crop() with a coarse heuristic (requires Rquefts).

Usage

nfert_crop_pars_quefts(crop_params)

Arguments

crop_params

Character crop description (e.g. from N_balance()) or a named list of QUEFTS crop parameters.

Value

List compatible with Rquefts::quefts(..., crop = crop_pars).

See also

nfert_to_quefts_crop()

On this page
